## Overview

`defenseclaw-gateway status` — Show health of the running sidecar's subsystems.

## Reference

<!-- BEGIN AUTOGEN:cli_go:status -->
<!-- Do not edit by hand. Regenerate with `make docs-gen`. -->

### Synopsis

```bash
status
```

### Description

Query the sidecar's REST API to display the health of all three subsystems:
gateway connection, skill watcher, and API server.

The sidecar must be running for this command to work.

<!-- END AUTOGEN:cli_go:status -->

## Usage

_Concrete invocation recipes are added by the `cli-commands` subagents.
Pair this with the equivalent Python wrapper command under
[Python CLI](/docs-site/cli/python-cli) — most gateway operations are
also available one layer up._
